mapper.select: SELECT pt.code, pt.name, up.preference_value, up.priority FROM user_preference up JOIN preference_type pt ON pt.id = up.preference_type_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY up.priority ASC, up.id ASC

SELECT id, code, name, description FROM preference_type WHERE code IN
#{code}

SELECT DISTINCT candidate.sgg_cd, candidate.sgg_nm, candidate.umd_cd, candidate.umd_nm, candidate.display_name, candidate.sort_order FROM ( SELECT s.sgg_cd, s.sgg_nm, NULL AS umd_cd, '' AS umd_nm, s.sgg_nm AS display_name, 0 AS sort_order FROM ( SELECT r.sgg_cd, MIN(r.sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm FROM region r GROUP BY r.sgg_cd ) s WHERE REPLACE(s.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CASE WHEN RIGHT(s.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('군', '구') THEN LEFT(s.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(s.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE s.sgg_nm END, ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\'
UNION ALL
SELECT r.sgg_cd, r.sgg_nm, r.umd_cd, r.umd_nm, CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, ' ', r.umd_nm) AS display_name, 1 AS sort_order FROM region r WHERE REPLACE(CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, r.umd_nm), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CONCAT( , r.umd_nm ), ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CONCAT( CASE WHEN RIGHT(r.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('군', '구') THEN LEFT(r.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(r.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE r.sgg_nm END, r.umd_nm ), ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.umd_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' ) candidate ORDER BY candidate.sort_order ASC, candidate.sgg_cd ASC, candidate.umd_nm ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_preference (user_id, preference_type_id, preference_value, priority) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{item.preferenceTypeId}, #{item.preferenceValue}, #{item.priority})
